completed_tasks.name: Restore home-entry, reload, and sign-out auth-session coverage
completed_tasks.progress: Targeted auth-route Playwright coverage now passes for home Scan CTA redirect, reload/session restore, and sign-out reset across Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit.

completed_tasks.name: Add local Convex identity-mapping test harness
completed_tasks.progress: Added vitest convex project, Convex test setup, and users tests proving signed-out behavior plus stable repeat-session identity mapping via getAuthUserId-derived reads.

completed_tasks.name: Record Phase 4 verification evidence
completed_tasks.progress: README and 04-VERIFICATION.md were updated with current commands and evidence, but AUTH-02 and DATA-01 remain partial until dedicated end-to-end proof is added.

remaining_tasks.name: Add explicit refresh-token failure end-to-end proof
Add dedicated browser-level first and repeat sign-in identity-mapping verification
Finish Phase 4 summaries and verification closeout

blockers.description: Phase 4 still lacks a dedicated browser-visible assertion path for first-sign-in/repeat-sign-in identity mapping and refresh-token failure recovery, so verification remains partial even though local Convex tests and auth-route browser tests pass.
blockers.workaround: Extend an app-safe current-user surface or add a tightly scoped test harness that reads server-derived auth state without accepting any client-provided identity key.

decisions.decision: Use local Convex tests to prove stable identity mapping before adding browser-level verification
decisions.rationale: This closes the server-side uncertainty first while avoiding unsafe client-supplied identity arguments.

decisions.decision: Keep Phase 4 verification explicit about partial requirement coverage
decisions.rationale: AUTH-02 and DATA-01 should not be marked complete from indirect evidence alone.

next_action: Start by designing the smallest safe browser-visible identity assertion path for Phase 4 Plan 2, then add the dedicated Playwright spec that covers first sign-in, sign-out, repeat sign-in, and reload without introducing any client-supplied user identifier.
context_notes: Phase 4 is the active pause context even though the old milestone STATE file still says the prior milestone was complete. This session added concrete local Convex verification and tightened the auth-session browser evidence, but the phase is not done: refresh-failure proof and browser-level identity-mapping proof are still missing, and summaries for 04-01/04-02 have not been written yet. The worktree also contains unrelated concurrent edits outside the handoff files; do not disturb them when resuming.
